title: Studio Calico August Kits Reveal
excerpt: The only regret I have with these Marks & Co kits is that I didn't have more time to work on the layouts. I received them while abroad on the babymoon (photos to come soon) and then had less than…
body:
The only regret I have with these Marks & Co kits is that I didn't have more time to work on the layouts. I received them while abroad on the babymoon (photos to come soon) and then had less than a week where I was cramming a ton of work along with readying the new place, along with fighting jet lag, shortness of breath, and a cough. Thankfully, I can work pretty quickly. But I wanted to spend more time because this kit is definitely one of my favorites ever. It has so much of the newest CHA releases (including Cut & Paste!) along with some awesome exclusives that I can see on tons of future projects - you have been warned. Plus I didn't even get to break out the Silhouette to play with the digital cut files as some of the other creative team members did. And they rocked it. I did get a chance to snap some photos as I put together this layout using the Scrapbook kit as well as the Project Life kit.

From my Nikon D90, I hooked up my Pivi printer to get these digital Instax photos. I heard this printer is nearly impossible to find now. If you do happen to stumble across one, I highly recommend getting it. After some stitching and finishing touches, here is how the layout turned out:

And one of the things I am most excited about is the exclusive embroidery stencil kit.

My full gallery can be seen here. Hope you're able to get your hands on what you want from these amazing Marks & Co kits!
